name: cairn
description: Portable agent environment bootstrap — memory, laws, skills, context templates. Works in Claude Code and Cowork. Domain-agnostic.

userClaude.cowork: probe: workspace-level .claude/ or equivalent user-scoped config; ask user if uncertain

projectClaude.description: Project-scoped Claude config (applies to current work effort only)

projectRoot.description: Root of the current work effort

files.description: Top-level memory index — points at the four memory types
User memory conventions — continuous background, no citation
Feedback memory conventions — fires discretely, cite [MEM feedback/<name>]
Project memory conventions — decision-shaping, cite [MEM project/<name>]
Reference memory conventions — episodic lookups, cite [MEM reference/<name>]
Project context template — fill in per work effort
Meta-laws + seed laws. Customize per domain.
Post-install onboarding walk-through — 'say tour to see what was installed'
Review stale memories and obsolete laws (domain-agnostic)
Report citation frequency of laws and memories — feeds /prune
File structured feedback about cairn itself to the cairn repo (agent-driven)

modes.create-if-absent: Write only if destination does not exist. Never overwrite.
modes.merge-append: Append cairn section to existing file (idempotent by marker).
modes.overwrite-with-backup: Back up existing to {dest}.bak, then overwrite. Requires explicit user approval.
